spec.description: Health and performance monitoring for the Prometheus instance itself

spec.title: TSDB Head Series & Chunks
spec.description: Number of time series in TSDB head over time

spec.title: Sample Ingestion Rate
spec.description: Rate of samples appended to TSDB

spec.title: HTTP Request Rate
spec.description: Rate of incoming HTTP requests to Prometheus

spec.title: Prometheus OTLP Endpoint HTTP Rate
spec.description: HTTP requests to the Prometheus OTLP endpoint broken down by response code

spec.title: OTLP Samples Appended
spec.description: Rate of samples appended to the TSDB via the Prometheus OTLP receiver endpoint

spec.title: WAL Size & Segment
spec.description: WAL storage size and WAL segment number over time

spec.title: TSDB Compactions
spec.description: Cumulative compactions and compaction failures over time

spec.title: Query Engine Concurrency
spec.description: Active queries vs maximum concurrent queries allowed in the engine

spec.title: Query Duration Percentiles
spec.description: P50, P90, and P99 query duration for inner_eval and full query phases

spec.title: Query Samples Rate
spec.description: Rate of samples processed by the query engine

spec.title: Prometheus Logs
spec.description: Log stream from the Prometheus instance

spec.title: CPU Profile Rate
spec.description: CPU time consumed by the Prometheus process over time (profiletometrics)

spec.title: Memory In-Use Profile
spec.description: In-use memory bytes from Pyroscope profiletometrics

spec.title: Memory In-Use Flamegraph
spec.description: In-use memory flamegraph for the Prometheus process

spec.title: Goroutines Flamegraph
spec.description: Goroutine stack flamegraph for the Prometheus process

spec.title: CPU Flamegraph
spec.description: CPU flamegraph for the Prometheus process

spec.title: Prometheus
